title: Impersonal se
subtitle: Say one does / people do.
overview: Se + verb can express general actions.
It is common on signs and in practical explanations.

items.es: En este restaurante se come muy bien.
items.en: People eat very well in this restaurant.

items.es: Aquí se puede pagar con tarjeta.
items.en: Here one can pay by card.

items.es: En mi casa se cena tarde.
items.en: In my house people eat dinner late.

items.es: No se puede entrar sin reserva.
items.en: One cannot enter without a reservation.
